level1() - Static method in class home.Home
Starts level 1 game and switches the main frame to level 1 screen.
Level1 - Class in game
Represents the first level of the game.

Constructs a new Level1 instance.
level1GUI - Static variable in class main.MainGUI

level3GUI - Static variable in class main.MainGUI
 
listExistUsers() - Static method in class authentication.Authentication
Reads and returns all existing users and their passwords from the users file.
log(String, boolean) - Method in class player.Player
Helps to write new lines in the log file
login(String, String) - Static method in class authentication.Login
Attempts to log in the user with the given parameters.
Login - Class in authentication
Verifies the username and password with stored data in users.txt.
Login() - Constructor for class authentication.Login
 
loginGUI - Static variable in class main.MainGUI
 
LoginGUI - Class in authentication
The login panel for the application.

Constructs the LoginGUI interface with the main frame.
